metaData.Key Information: rispy Fish Crackers are light, crunchy, and packed with a delicious fish flavor. A perfect snack for seafood lovers craving a crispy bite.

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: Treat for your tastebuds. Each of our crackers are made with real fish and a traditional recipe dating back to 1950. The right combination of saltiness, sweetness, spice and the last big crunch makes each bite too good to resist! It is ideal for all ages either for personal indulgences or warmhearted socializing at the dinner table as an appetiser.

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: In our multi-racial country Singapore, it's common for people to purchase snacks that originate from different countries. Many people actually like murukku so much, they have it for all seasons, not just during Deepavali! Papadums are very popular as they are included when you order nasi briyani, but murukku crackers are actually the top favourite Indian snack! These spicy murukku pack a punch and definitely leave you wanting more. It is addictive, crunchy and definitely hot with spices! Ingredients: Wheat flour, palm oil, dal powder, modified starch, chilli powder, spices, mixed seasoning, fish flavouring, sesame, salt, ammonia carbonate, sodium carbonate, sweeterner (E955), & MSG (E621).<<

tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Ingredients: Dal Flour, Potato Flour, Salt, Garlic, Oil, Water, Permitted Food Colourings
metaData.Key Information:
In our multi-racial country Singapore, it's common for people to purchase snacks that originate from different races.
Many people actually like murukku (or muruku) so much, they have it for all seasons, not just during Deepavali. That is why murukkus are the top favourite Indian snack! These Star Murukku have a more garlic taste and have a better crunch due to its twists and its cross-section resembling a star shape.
For the original murukku, we have Butter Murukku Crackers. For hot taste, do try Spicy Murukku Crackers. For the ultimate crunch, Round Murukku Crackers will be suitable.
